expectations.text: Flags every any usage in the file
expectations.evidence: Flags 5 instances: data param (issue 2), result variable (issue 3), getConfig return (issue 4), formatUser param (issue 5), and inferred any return (issue 12). All any locations in the file are covered.
Issue 6: 'data as UserData' flagged as casting without runtime check. Issue 7: 'user.role as union' flagged as narrowing any without verification.
Issue 1 (first item): 'Default exports allow silent renames at import sites, breaking symbol search and rename refactors.'
Issue 10: 'Call sites will read as processData(userData, true, false) -- opaque without jumping to the signature.' Recommends options object.
Issue 8: 'config.settings!.timeout -- getConfig parses {} as fallback, settings will be undefined. The ! assertion suppresses a real null risk.'

expectations.text: Does NOT flag formatting or import order issues
expectations.evidence: No formatting, whitespace, or import ordering complaints anywhere in the review. Consistent with the skill's exclusion: 'if the compiler and linter pass, do not flag.'
